welcome_offer.description: Earn up to 175,000 Membership Rewards points after eligible spend within the first 6 months. Amex may personalize offers; verify session-visible terms before applying.
notes: Priority adaptor: flagship Amex card lacked adaptor coverage despite data card existing.
2026 refresh benefits include the $200 Oura Ring credit and other refreshed credits in data/cards/amex-platinum.json; benefit changes remain manual-review fields.
source_conflicts: Amex welcome offers may vary by session/applicant; lower public/session offers may appear.

open_questions: Verify exact public/session offer amount and spend requirement before applying because Amex frequently uses personalized/as-high-as language.
Confirm refreshed credit bundle including Oura credit remains visible on issuer page.
Resolved stance: 175k should be labeled as-high-as / eligibility-varying, not guaranteed universal public.

community.summary: Adds adaptor coverage for Amex Personal Platinum. Treat 175k as as-high-as/session-sensitive until issuer snapshot confirms exact terms. Resolved stance: 175k should be labeled as-high-as / eligibility-varying, not guaranteed universal public.

observations.excerpt: Amex page should be checked for as-high-as 175,000 MR terms and refreshed credits such as Oura.
